title: Eulalia koretrostachys
taxonomy: Eulalia koretrostachys is classified within the Poaceae family and is a type of grass. It is a species native to China. The classification of Eulalia koretrostachys is further broken down into the genus Eulalia and the subfamily Bambusoideae. Eulalia koretrostachys is a member of the tribe Arundinarieae. Within the kingdom Plantae, Eulalia koretrostachys is classified as an angiosperm.
uses: Eulalia koretrostachys has been studied for its potential medicinal uses, including anti-inflammatory properties.
